sections.paragraph: & µwOda; adj., f. אֲדֻמָּה, pl. אֲדֻמִּים (of the form קָטֹל, קְטֻלָּה, which is frequently used in the names of colours, Lehrg. § 120, No. 21), red, ruddy, used of a garment stained with blood, Isa 63:2 of rosy cheeks, Son 5:10 of a chesnut or bay horse (Fuchs), Zec 1:8 6:2 of a red heifer, Num 19:2 of the redness of lentiles, Gen 25:30 subst. what is red, redness, Isa. loc. cit.
